query:
SELECT p.id, p.batchNo, p.poNumber, p.vendorName, p.productName, p.createdAt, p.updatedAt, p.currentStationCode, p.currentStatus
FROM products p
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('FLOW-STOCK-BATCH-1779024145508', 'MANUAL-NEXT-1779024163008-01', 'RESTORE-BATCH-1779024197350')
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC;
